name: gdelt-market-news-monitor
description: Search global news coverage through GDELT and normalize article, source, country, language, image, and tone fields.
business_value: Market intelligence, supply-chain monitoring, country-risk tracking, and competitor news discovery.

auth.note: GDELT DOC API is public; keep request volume polite.

verification_result: Example fixture validates global news rows with source country, language, and tone fields.
known_risks: GDELT search syntax and result ranking can change.
Tone and country fields are signals, not ground truth.
